en_title: Microsoft Expected Game Pass Would Have 77 Million Subscribers by Now but It Reportedly Only Has 30 Million, as Xbox Boss Admits the Strategy Has Failed
cn_title: 微软XBOX Game Pass订阅量远低预期
subtitle: 战略已经失败
opus_summary: 微软曾预计Game Pass今年订阅用户达到7700万，但据称目前只有3000万。XBOX负责人承认，这一战略没有达到预期。

paragraphs.en: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has admitted Game Pass has failed to grow as Microsoft had expected, with reports indicating it is tens of millions of subscribers short of previous targets.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX CEO Asha Sharma承认，Game Pass没有像微软预期那样增长。报道称，它距离此前目标还差数千万订阅用户。

paragraphs.en: The Wall Street Journal reports that Microsoft had expected Game Pass to hit 77 million subscribers this year. Instead, it currently has 30 million subscribers. The FTC trial over Microsoft’s acquisition of Activision Blizzard previously revealed that the company once hoped Game Pass would reach 100 million subscribers by 2030.
paragraphs.cn: 《华尔街日报》报道称，微软曾预计Game Pass今年会达到7700万订阅用户。但目前它只有3000万订阅用户。围绕微软收购动视暴雪的FTC审判此前披露，微软一度希望Game Pass在2030年前达到1亿订阅用户。

paragraphs.en: This week, Microsoft announced sweeping cuts across its gaming business, with 1,600 staff let go immediately and another 1,600 to follow over the current financial year.
paragraphs.cn: 本周，微软宣布对游戏业务进行大规模裁员，1600名员工立即离职，另外1600名员工将在本财年内陆续离职。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has jettisoned four studios that joined the company during the Phil Spencer era, when the company was buying teams to bolster Game Pass. Another studio is now in consultation over its future.
paragraphs.cn: 微软已经剥离了四家在菲尔·斯宾塞时代加入公司的工作室。当时微软正在收购团队，以强化Game Pass阵容。另有一家工作室正在就未来去向进行磋商。

paragraphs.en: In an internal email to staff, Sharma admitted that Microsoft’s gaming strategy had failed, with Game Pass a key part of that plan.
paragraphs.cn: 在发给员工的内部邮件中，Sharma承认微软的游戏战略已经失败，而Game Pass正是这一战略的关键部分。

paragraphs.en: “The business is not healthy,” Sharma wrote, according to The Wall Street Journal. “Our margins are three to 10 times lower than our competitors. The Gen 9 console generation has a smaller install base and higher costs. We bet on Game Pass, multiplatform and broader content, but it hasn’t grown as expected, and our core has weakened. We added teams, investment and time, but we now face a hardware crisis. We need to reset Xbox.”
paragraphs.cn: 据《华尔街日报》报道，Sharma写道：「业务并不健康。我们的利润率比竞争对手低3到10倍。第九世代主机的装机量更小，成本却更高。我们押注Game Pass、跨平台和更广泛的内容，但它没有按预期增长，我们的核心业务也被削弱。我们增加了团队、投入和时间，但现在面临硬件危机。我们需要重置XBOX。」

paragraphs.en: Game Pass gives subscribers access to an expanding library of games and day-one launches. Microsoft spent huge sums to feed that library, including $69 billion on Activision Blizzard. Phil Spencer had hoped Call of Duty arriving day one on Game Pass would help drive subscriptions, but growth stalled and Xbox console sales hit a wall.
paragraphs.cn: Game Pass让订阅用户可以游玩不断扩充的游戏库，并获得首发入库作品。为了填充这个游戏库，微软投入了巨额资金，其中包括以690亿美元(约合人民币4692亿元)收购动视暴雪。菲尔·斯宾塞曾希望《使命召唤》首发加入Game Pass能够推动订阅增长，但增长陷入停滞，XBOX主机销量也撞上了天花板。

paragraphs.en: Spencer raised Game Pass prices by 50% last October, while analyst Matthew Ball said the service shed millions of subscribers in the months that followed.
paragraphs.cn: 斯宾塞去年10月将Game Pass价格上调了50%。分析师Matthew Ball称，该服务随后几个月流失了数百万订阅用户。

paragraphs.en: The exact number of Game Pass subscribers in early 2026 remains unclear. Microsoft said Game Pass had at least 34 million subscribers in February 2024, and that annual revenue had reached almost $5 billion by July 2025.
paragraphs.cn: Game Pass在2026年初的具体订阅用户数仍不清楚。微软曾表示，Game Pass在2024年2月拥有至少3400万订阅用户，并称到2025年7月，其年收入已接近50亿美元(约合人民币340亿元)。

paragraphs.en: Sharma has since cut the price and pulled Call of Duty out of Game Pass as a day-one release. Bloomberg quoted her as saying that after an eight-month decline, the service had been reset and had returned to growth and retention.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma随后下调了价格，并将《使命召唤》从Game Pass首发阵容中移出。彭博社援引她的话称，在经历8个月下滑后，该服务已经完成重置，并重新回到增长和留存状态。

paragraphs.en: With Double Fine, Compulsion Games, Ninja Theory and Undead Labs leaving Microsoft, their future games are no longer obliged to launch on Game Pass. That means players may not see State of Decay 3, Senua, or future Double Fine and Compulsion projects arrive on the service on day one.
paragraphs.cn: 随着Double Fine、Compulsion Games、Ninja Theory和Undead Labs离开微软，它们未来的游戏将不再有义务登陆Game Pass首发阵容。这意味着玩家未必还能看到《腐烂国度3》、《塞娜》，以及Double Fine和Compulsion未来项目在发售首日加入该服务。

paragraphs.en: The question now is how Microsoft grows Game Pass from here. If Call of Duty could not move the needle, what can? Will Microsoft pull more games away from day-one releases? Will The Elder Scrolls 6 still arrive there? What about Halo? Or will Game Pass become more like PlayStation Plus?
paragraphs.cn: 现在的问题是，微软接下来要如何推动Game Pass增长。如果《使命召唤》都无法带来明显变化，还有什么能做到？微软会不会把更多游戏移出首发阵容？《上古卷轴6》还会首发加入吗？《光环》呢？还是说Game Pass会变得更像PlayStation Plus？
